meta.feed_title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

items.title: Trump claims Iran wants to ‘make a deal’
items.summary: US President Donald Trump claimed Tehran is seeking a deal and praised the strength of the the US military.

items.title: Yemen’s Houthis launch missile attack on Israel as war on Iran intensifies
items.summary: Rebels say they fired a barrage of ballistic missiles targeting 'sensitive Israeli military sites' in southern Israel.

items.title: US Secretary of State says war could conclude in ‘weeks, not months’
items.summary: US secretary of state Marco Rubio told reporters that the US is seeking to conclude the war in a matter of weeks.

items.title: Doncic faces one-game ban after technical foul in Lakers win against Nets
items.summary: Luka Doncic's 41 points against Nets was soured by his 16th technical foul of the season, triggering a one-game ban.

items.title: White is hero and villain on England return, Germany’s Wirtz destroys Swiss
items.summary: Uruguay hold England at Wembley, Germany defeat Switzerland, and Netherlands beat Norway in pre-World Cup friendlies.

items.title: ‘She left her body’: A mother’s fight against her daughter’s anorexia
items.summary: When her daughter developed anorexia nervosa, Rita Orza faced a solitary struggle to help her child survive and recover.

items.title: Israel’s unending attacks in Lebanon push country’s population to the brink
items.summary: Four weeks into the US-Israeli war on Iran, many in Lebanon are suffering under yet another Israeli aggression.

items.title: Uproar in Bahrain after detainee dies in police custody
items.summary: Rights groups in Bahrain say a 32-year-old man, arrested for opposing the war on Iran, was killed in police custody.

items.title: How the US-Israel war on Iran unfolded in its first four weeks
items.summary: Al Jazeera revisits major military, political and economic developments that took place in first month of the conflict.

items.title: Trump says ‘Cuba is next’ target of US military
items.summary: Donald Trump publicly threatened Cuba with military attack while speaking at a Saudi investment conference.

items.title: How mothers raise newborn babies during Israel’s offensive in Lebanon
items.summary: Israeli air strikes on Lebanon forced 29-year-old Hawraa Houmani to flee her village when she was nine months pregnant.

items.title: Intense bombing in Tehran, Isfahan
items.summary: Black smoke is rising over Tehran and Isfahan after early morning US-Israeli airstrikes on the cities.

items.title: Tiger Woods arrested for suspected DUI after rolling his car
items.summary: Police are charging professional golfer Tiger Woods with driving under the influence for a second time.

items.title: Trump says US-Israeli war on Iran creating a new Middle East
items.summary: Donald Trump told a Saudi investment conference that the Middle East will soon be free from Iranian “nuclear blackmail.”

items.title: Iran war live: Trump again slams NATO’s lack of support for war on Tehran
items.summary: Iranian Red Crescent says more than 92,600 civilian units were damaged across the country in US-Israeli attacks.

items.title: Rescue workers rush to save lives after south Tehran missile strike
items.summary: Iranian rescue workers have been pulling survivors and bodies out of a building after a missile strike on south Tehran.

items.title: Houthis warn ‘fingers on the trigger’ as US-Israel war on Iran continues
items.summary: The Iran-aligned Yemeni group have the ability to target key shipping lanes around the Arabian Peninsula.

items.title: ‘Fingers on the trigger’ for military intervention, Houthis warn
items.summary: The Houthis have warned that they are ready for direct military intervention in the US-Israeli war on Iran.

items.title: Tiger Woods charged with DUI after rollover crash in Florida
items.summary: Tiger Woods showed signs of impairment and was arrested at the scene of car crash in which he struck another vehicle.

items.title: Oyarzabal double seals Spain win against Serbia in World Cup warm-up
items.summary: Spain enjoy a comfortable night as Mikel Oyarzabal scores twice in 3-0 win against Serbia in warm-up for World Cup 2026.

items.title: What is the TACO trade and are investors profiting amid war on Iran?
items.summary: Global energy crisis continues to widen amid market volatility, while so-called 'TACO traders' attempt to capitalise.

items.title: Guns in the streets as US, Israel intensify month-long attacks across Iran
items.summary: A senior IRGC official in Tehran told state television that children over 12 can join armed patrols and checkpoints.

items.title: Mexico’s navy searches for two missing boats involved in Cuba aid convoy
items.summary: The Nuestra America Convoy said that the sailboats were led by 'experienced sailors' with access to safety equipment.

items.title: Grieving Iranian mother tells UN about children before school attack
items.summary: An Iranian mother told the UN Human Right’s Council about the last time she saw her children alive.

items.title: Israel launches strikes on nuclear sites as Iran warns of retaliation
items.summary: Uranium facility, steel plants and heavy water complex among targets hit as IRGC warns of escalation.
